---
title: "Recent Projects"
author: ""
comments: false
citation: false
<! -- description: |
  This portfolio is a collection of research initiatives, statistical models, and interactive visualizations. -->

listing: 
  contents:
    - galaxy_viewer.qmd
    - bohemia.qmd
    - "external-items/metadata.yml"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, description, categories, image]
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 100%
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
title-block-banner: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
resources:
  - ../assets/listing_default.css
---
